title: anisomeles brevipilosa
intro: Anisomeles brevipilosa, also known as the Thai mint or Thai mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anisomeles brevipilosa include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of Anisomeles brevipilosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
